expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: Result.md explicitly scopes to blind phase4a scenario drafts and includes three scenarios covering the required focus. It states: "Phase 4a Deliverable: Blind Scenario Drafts (Template Save / Builder Load / Visible Title)" and scenario coverage notes include "Covers: prompt handling, report builder loading, visible report title outcomes" (Scenario 4a-1) and "Covers: template save, report builder loading, visible report title outcomes" (Scenario 4a-2). It also reiterates in the alignment statement that it covers "prompt handling", "template save", "report builder loading", and "visible report title outcomes".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Result.md declares "Primary phase under test: phase4a (scenario drafting checkpoint)" and delivers "Phase 4a Deliverable: Blind Scenario Drafts". It also includes an explicit "Phase 4a Alignment Statement" saying the output is limited to phase4a scenario drafting and that no later-phase work is included.
